'''ân-sh-l-dh''' ('''kanashledhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teakettle|teakettle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teakettle|teakettle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-sh-l-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kanashledhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinashledhoko|thinashledhoko]] || [[word:jinashledhoko|jinashledhoko]] || [[word:shinashledhoko|shinashledhoko]] || [[word:kinashledhoko|kinashledhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnashledhoko|thĂŠnashledhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnashledhoko|jĂŠnashledhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnashledhoko|shĂŠnashledhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnashledhoko|kĂŠnashledhoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
